idea.title: Hue Sort
idea.hook: Test-tube colour sorting, but pouring one liquid onto a different colour BLENDS them — pour blue onto yellow and you get green, so you must un-mix your way back to pure tubes.
idea.prototype: Tubes hold stacked colour layers. Tap source then destination to pour the top run; if the destination top is a different blendable colour, the poured layer becomes a subtractive mix (blue+yellow=green, etc.). Win: every tube holds a single pure primary. Lose: pour budget exhausted with any tube impure or chromatically unrecoverable. Limited undo.
idea.mutation_of: yandex Ball Sort Puzzle + poki Happy Glass (pour)
idea.why_novel: subtractive colour chemistry means pours transform contents, forcing forward-planning of intermediate mixes
idea.lose_condition: Your pour budget hits zero while any tube still contains a mixed or non-pure colour layer.

sources.name: market-radar daily-mix 2026-05-24
sources.note: market_anchor slot, puzzle_objects archetype, clear color-group composition

sources.name: Happy Glass
sources.note: pour-physics inspiration for the blend twist

synthesizer_brief: Daily MARKET ANCHOR slot — mechanic-led. Take the proven Ball-Sort tube-sorting genre (high install base on Yandex casual) and add a single twist that changes the planning: pouring onto a different colour subtractively BLENDS (blue+yellow=green). This converts a pure tidy-up puzzle into a forward-planning puzzle where careless pours create un-recoverable mixes. Pressure is a limited pour budget (resource scarcity, NOT a timer). Cover borrows object scale / contrast / clear color groups from the CTR references but stays honest to the blending-tube mechanic. Mobile-first portrait.
